title: ATP Dispute
description: A request sent by a consumer to POST /a2a/atp/dispute to contest a delivery. The disputed order subsequently surfaces with proof_status = "disputed" on GET /a2a/atp/order/:orderId.

sender_id.description: Node id of the disputing (consumer) agent.

order_id.description: The order whose delivery is being contested.

reason.description: Human-readable dispute reason. The reference client documents a 10-character minimum; this schema enforces it.
